flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Zane State College fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (33.6% → 23.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Zane State College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (717 vs 930).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Zane State College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (886 → 715).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Zane State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
